title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Renames the CUE definition variable from pluginMetaV0Alpha1 to metaV0Alpha1 in apps/plugins/kinds/
1.2: Changes the kind field from 'PluginMeta' to 'Meta' in the CUE schema definition
1.3: Removes or changes the hardcoded plural 'pluginsmeta' so the resulting plural is 'metas'
1.4: Updates apps/plugins/kinds/manifest.cue to reference the renamed metaV0Alpha1 definition

1.5: Renames all 42 PluginMeta* type definitions (including PluginMeta → Meta, PluginMetaList → MetaList, PluginMetaSpec → MetaSpec, PluginMetaJSONData → MetaJSONData, PluginMetaClient → MetaClient, PluginMetaJSONCodec → MetaJSONCodec, PluginMetaStorage → MetaStorage, PluginMetaJSONDataType → MetaJSONDataType, PluginMetaInclude → MetaInclude, PluginMetaRoute → MetaRoute, ...) to their Meta* equivalents

1.6: Renames all 37 PluginMeta* package-level functions (including PluginMetaKind() → MetaKind(), PluginMetaSchema() → MetaSchema(), NewPluginMetaClient() → NewMetaClient(), NewPluginMetaStorage() → NewMetaStorage(), NewPluginMetaSpec() → NewMetaSpec(), NewPluginMetaJSONData() → NewMetaJSONData(), NewPluginMetaInfo() → NewMetaInfo(), createPluginMetaFromPluginMetaJSONData() → createMetaFromMetaJSONData(), jsonDataToPluginMetaJSONData() → jsonDataToMetaJSONData(), NewPluginMetaClientFromGenerator() → NewMetaClientFromGenerator(), ...) to their Meta* equivalents

1.7: Renames all 48 PluginMeta* methods (including (*PluginMeta).GetSpec → (*Meta).GetSpec, (*PluginMeta).SetSpec → (*Meta).SetSpec, (*PluginMeta).DeepCopy → (*Meta).DeepCopy, (*PluginMeta).Copy → (*Meta).Copy, (*PluginMetaClient).Create → (*MetaClient).Create, (*PluginMetaClient).Get → (*MetaClient).Get, (*PluginMetaList).GetItems → (*MetaList).GetItems, (*PluginMetaJSONCodec).Read → (*MetaJSONCodec).Read, (*PluginMetaStorage).List → (*MetaStorage).List, (*PluginMetaSpec).DeepCopy → (*MetaSpec).DeepCopy, ...) to their Meta* equivalents
1.8: Adds a NewMeta() constructor that returns *Meta with default-initialized Spec and Status
1.9: Adds a NewPlugin() constructor that returns *Plugin with default-initialized Spec and Status
1.10: Uses NewPlugin() in Plugin schema registration instead of a bare struct literal
1.11: Updates the app manifest to register the renamed 'Meta' kind with MetaKind()
1.12: Updates the storage layer to reference renamed Meta types instead of PluginMeta types
1.13: Updates the metadata providers in apps/plugins/pkg/app/meta/ to use Meta types
1.14: Updates all 4 RBAC action strings (plugins.pluginsmeta:create, plugins.pluginsmeta:write, plugins.pluginsmeta:read, plugins.pluginsmeta:delete) to use 'plugins.metas' as the resource prefix
1.15: Updates the RBAC scope provider from 'plugins.pluginsmeta' to 'plugins.metas'
1.16: Updates the 2 RBAC role names (fixed:plugins.pluginsmeta:reader, fixed:plugins.pluginsmeta:writer) to use 'fixed:plugins.metas' as the role prefix
1.17: Updates the permission registry entry from 'plugins.pluginsmeta' to 'plugins.metas'
1.18: Updates the auth mapper resource translation from 'pluginsmeta' to 'metas'
2: Documentation Maintainability
2.1: Updates code comments referencing 'PluginMeta' to reference 'Meta' in modified source files (such as meta_object_gen.go, meta_codec_gen.go, core.go, storage.go, provider.go)
3: Artifact Cleanup

3.1: Removes or replaces all 7 old pluginmeta gen files (pluginmeta_client_gen.go, pluginmeta_codec_gen.go, pluginmeta_metadata_gen.go, pluginmeta_object_gen.go, pluginmeta_status_gen.go, pluginmeta_schema_gen.go, pluginmeta_spec_gen.go) so no duplicate type definitions remain
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Renames or removes any of the existing Plugin kind types (Plugin, PluginList, PluginSpec, PluginStatus, PluginKind, PluginClient) or their methods instead of targeting only PluginMeta types
